description: Real-source launch ingestion manifest for deterministic M002/S02 source capture. Targets must be public, non-sample, and safe to ingest without network access by default.

targets.title: California Secretary of State certified candidate list for the June 2, 2026 primary
targets.notes: Deterministic text capture of the official certified candidate list source URL used for M002 statewide, federal, BOE, and Assembly candidate entities. Not an endorsement source.
